topic: Claim your free Google Business Profile in 10 minutes
caption:
Your business might be invisible on Google right now.
Go to business.google.com and claim your free profile.
Add your hours, phone number, and a photo. Done.
This one step puts you on the map before you even have a website.
Want the full setup? Link in bio.

#HighDesert #Victorville #Hesperia #AppleValley #SmallBusiness #SmallBusinessOwner #LocalSEO #WebDesign #VeteranOwned #InlandEmpire #GoogleBusiness #LocalMarketing
alt_text: A smartphone screen showing a Google Maps business listing for a local High Desert small business, with a star rating and contact details visible.

copy.headline: Claim Your Google Business Profile Today
copy.body: If your business isn't on Google Maps, you're invisible to local customers. Takes 10 minutes. Costs nothing.
copy.caption:
Your business might be invisible on Google right now.
